item.title: [GRA][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan Filerz maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 1, 04:30 - 06:30 UTC

Jun 27, 16:44 UTC
Update - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our MX Plan Filerz.
The maintenance will update the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

Start time : 01/07/2026 04:30 UTC
End time : 01/07/2026 06:30 UTC
Service impact : The service will be temporarily unavailable for 40 minutes during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Mail filerz.

Thank you for your understanding.

Jun 25, 09:24 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our MX Plan Filerz.
The maintenance will update the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

Start time : 01/07/2026 04:30 UTC
End time : 01/07/2026 06:30 UTC
Service impact : The service will be temporarily unavailable for 40 minutes during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Mail filerz.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Clusters 103/106/110/111/113/114/115 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 29, 20:00 UTC  -  Jul 3, 00:00 UTC

Jun 25, 20:26 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer.

Start time : 29/06/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 03/07/2026 00:00 UTC

List of concerned Filerz:

29/06/2026 22:00 UTC
- filerz887 Cluster 103
- filerz888 Cluster 103
- filerz889 Cluster 103
- filerz753 Cluster 106
- filerz754 Cluster 106
- filerz755 Cluster 106
- filerz666 Cluster 110
- filerz672 Cluster 110
- filerz678 Cluster 110

30/06/2026 06:00 UTC
- filerz892 Cluster 103
- filerz893 Cluster 103
- filerz894 Cluster 103
- filerz756 Cluster 106
- filerz757 Cluster 106
- filerz758 Cluster 106
- filerz679 Cluster 110
- filerz681 Cluster 110
- filerz684 Cluster 110

30/06/2026 22:00 UTC
- filerz895 Cluster 103
- filerz896 Cluster 103
- filerz899 Cluster 103
- filerz759 Cluster 106
- filerz760 Cluster 106
- filerz761 Cluster 106
- filerz687 Cluster 110
- filerz511 Cluster 111
- filerz515 Cluster 111

01/07/2026 06:00 UTC
- filerz901 Cluster 103
- filerz913 Cluster 103
- filerz914 Cluster 103
- filerz764 Cluster 106
- filerz766 Cluster 106
- filerz769 Cluster 106
- filerz525 Cluster 111
- filerz528 Cluster 111
- filerz533 Cluster 111

01/07/2026 22:00 UTC
- filerz917 Cluster 103
- filerz770 Cluster 106
- filerz771 Cluster 106
- filerz772 Cluster 106
- filerz551 Cluster 111
- filerz553 Cluster 111
- filerz560 Cluster 111
- filerz261 Cluster 113
- filerz286 Cluster 113

02/07/2026 06:00 UTC
- filerz773 Cluster 106
- filerz774 Cluster 106
- filerz775 Cluster 106
- filerz291 Cluster 113
- filerz294 Cluster 113
- filerz547 Cluster 114
- filerz564 Cluster 114
- filerz568 Cluster 114
- filerz421 Cluster 115

02/07/2026 22:00 UTC
- filerz776 Cluster 106
- filerz778 Cluster 106
- filerz779 Cluster 106
- filerz576 Cluster 114
- filerz581 Cluster 114
- filerz585 Cluster 114
- filerz425 Cluster 115
- filerz428 Cluster 115
- filerz429 Cluster 115

Service impact : We will be migrating the various Filerz servers to keep our infrastructure up to date and more stable, thereby preventing further service interruptions. The Filerz servers will be unavailable for 30 minutes on the scheduled migration date.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing maintenance on the Web Hosting infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Filerz115 - Cluster121 incident notification
item.description:
Jun 27, 16:37 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering on Filerz115 - Cluster121 has been resolved.

Start time : 27/06/2026 13:00 UTC
End time : 27/06/2026 16:34 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 27, 14:11 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Web Hosting offer on the specific Filerz115 - Cluster121.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 27/06/2026 13:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Filerz115 is facing slowness on Web Hosting cluster121.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily facing slowness when trying to access their websites hosted on Filerz115 - Cluster12
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

Jun 27, 13:12 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary latency issue in the Filerz115 - Cluster121.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 27/06/2026 13:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Filerz115 is facing slowness on Web Hosting cluster121.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily facing slowness when trying to access their websites hosted on Filerz115 - Cluster12
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Filerz430 - Cluster115 incident notification
item.description:
Jun 27, 14:25 UTC

Jun 27, 14:14 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary latency issue in the Filerz430 - Cluster115.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 27/06/2026 14:05 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Filerz430 is facing slowness on Web Hosting Cluster115.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily facing slowness when trying to access their websites hosted on Filerz430 - Cluster115.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster121 incident notification
item.description:
Jun 27, 02:47 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 26/06/2026 09:12 UTC
End time : 26/06/2026 18:00 UTC
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 26, 18:41 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 26/06/2026 18:00 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 26/06/2026 09:12 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Cluster121 was experiencing latency.
Customers Impact : Customers were experiencing slowdowns when attempting to perform operations on Cluster121.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 26, 18:13 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : The cluster121 was temporarily unavailable from 26/06/2026 17:00 UTC to 26/2026 18:00 UTC.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating the cause of the incident and working to resolve the latency issues experienced by customers.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 26, 09:41 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary latency issue in the GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 26/06/2026 09:12 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Cluster121 is experiencing latency.
Customers Impact : Customers are currently experiencing slowdowns when attempting to perform operations on Cluster121.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Filerz915 Cluster103 incident notification
item.description:
Jun 26, 13:20 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 26/06/2026 10:40 UTC
End time : 26/06/2026 12:30 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 26, 10:59 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary availability issues on the Filerz915 Cluster103.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 26/06/2026 10:40 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Filerz915 is unreachable on Web Hosting Cluster103.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access and use their websites hosted on the specified Filerz.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Clusters 107/111/115/120/123/124/126/127/128/129/130/131 Incident Notification
item.description:
Jun 26, 08:28 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 25/06/2026 22:28 UTC
End time : 26/06/2026 08:16 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 26, 07:41 UTC
Update - Please find an update of this incident below :
Update: The network equipment has now been restored and is fully operational. As a result, several impacted services have recovered successfully. However, we are also experiencing an impact on Cluster024
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively investigating and working to fully restore the services impacted as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 26, 04:44 UTC
Update - Please find below an update on the situation:
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are replacing the affected network equipment and are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 26, 01:32 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : The incident is still in progress.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working on implementing the necessary actions to restore normal service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 25, 22:51 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Web Hosting offer on the specific GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 25/06/2026 22:28 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The filerz 25/60/76/194/230/380/381/382/386/396/455/524/1003/1018/1019/1514/1518/1595/1599/1917 are unreachable on Web Hosting Clusters 107/111/115/120/123/126/127/128/129/130/131.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access and use their websites hosted on the specified clusters and filerz.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan Incident Notification
item.description:
Jun 26, 07:08 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering has been resolved.

Start time : 25/06/2026 22:28 UTC
End time : 26/06/2026 07:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 26, 04:44 UTC
Update - Please find below an update on the situation:
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are replacing the affected network equipment and are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 26, 00:59 UTC
Identified - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Nearly all services have now been restored and are operational again.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore the remaining services.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 25, 23:17 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Collaborative solutions offer on the specific GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 25/06/2026 22:28 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The mailboxes are unavailable on servers homez1 / homez7 / homez8 / homez9 / homez11 / homez12 / homez13 / homez15 / homez65.
Customers Impact : Customers are unable to log in to their email addresses via webmail or a heavy mail client, and were unable to send or receive emails. Any emails received during the incident were stored and delivered once the incident was resolved.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web-Databases] - CloudDB - SharedSQL incident notification
item.description:
Jun 26, 06:45 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web-Databases offering has been resolved.

Start time : 25/06/2026 18:51 UTC
End time : 26/06/2026 06:30 UTC
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 25, 19:42 UTC
Update - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Web-Databases offer.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 25/06/2026 18:51 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : clouddb062.eu012 - clouddb071.eu010 and sharedsql009.eu011 - sharedsql003.eu007 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their databases hosted on the specified clouddb and sharedsql.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 25, 19:41 UTC
Update - We are continuing to work on a fix for this issue.

Jun 25, 19:34 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Web-Databases offer.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 25/06/2026 18:51 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : clouddb062.eu012 - clouddb071.eu010 and sharedsql009.eu011 - sharedsql003.eu007 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their databases hosted on the specified clouddb and sharedsql.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan Incident Notification
item.description:
Jun 25, 22:35 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Collaborative solutions offer in GRA region which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 25/06/2026 21:18 UTC
End time : 25/06/2026 22:02 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The mailboxes were unavailable on servers homez1 / homez7 / homez8 / homez9 / homez11 / homez12 / homez13 / homez15 / homez65.
Customers Impact : Customers were unable to log in to their email addresses via webmail or a heavy mail client, and were unable to send or receive emails. Any emails received during the incident were stored and delivered once the incident was resolved.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 23, 09:25 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Web Hosting offer on the specific GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 23/06/2026 08:50 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some websites in cluster106 Filerz778/779/753/775/776/770/745/726 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers may be temporarily unable to access their websites.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 19, 12:51 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering, which is causing temporary latency issue in the GLOBAL region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 19/06/2026 09:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Delays for sending and receiving mails are temporarily being observed.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily facing delays when sending or receiving mails.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Logs Cluster121 incident notification
item.description:
Jun 17, 19:59 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 17/06/2026 17:30 UTC
End time : 17/06/2026 18:10 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 17, 18:16 UTC
Monitoring - We would like to inform you that the service has been fully restored as of 17/06/2026 at 18:10 UTC
Monitoring is still in place to ensure long-term stability.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 17/06/2026 17:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Logs on Cluster121 were temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers could not view logs on https://logs.cluster121.hosting.ovh.net
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 17, 18:01 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering on the Cluster121.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 17/06/2026 17:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Logs on Cluster121 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers cannot view logs on https://logs.cluster121.hosting.ovh.net
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident to fix it. 

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Customers Impact : Customers may temporarily experience slowdowns on their websites hosted on filerz10002 cluster121.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
